name: OFPPT-Reseau-Infrastructure
description: VM filière Réseau & Infrastructure — Wireshark, FRRouting (OSPF/BGP/RIP), OpenVPN, WireGuard, Open vSwitch, iptables, DHCP/DNS
notes:
Taille recommandée : Standard_D2s_v3 (2 vCPU / 8 GB RAM)
OS : Ubuntu Server 22.04 LTS
Disque : 128 GB Premium SSD

Outils installés via artefact 'reseau-tools' :
- Wireshark + tcpdump + tshark
- Nmap, Masscan, netdiscover, iperf3, mtr
- FRRouting (OSPF, BGP, RIP, IS-IS)
- OpenVPN + Easy-RSA
- WireGuard
- Open vSwitch
- iptables + nftables
- isc-dhcp-server, BIND9, dnsmasq
